column1: I am speaking to you. I have ___ to you.
That man is driving a car. That man has ___ a car.
My friend is sleeping. My friend has ___.
She is in Prague. She has ___ in Prague.
They are arguing about money. They have ___ money.
They are taking a test. They have ___ a test.
I am listening to music. I have ___ to music.
The musician is playing a song. The musician has ___ a song.
She is flying to Berlin. She has ___ to Berlin.
